The Rock Restaurant Zanzibar

The Rock is a recognizable Zanzibar dining stop for travelers who want one memorable meal between Stone Town culture and beach time.

★ 4.3 1,028 reviews
Image slot Restaurant The Rock Restaurant Zanzibar

About this restaurant

The Rock is a recognizable Zanzibar dining stop for travelers who want one memorable meal between Stone Town culture and beach time.

Signature dish

Seafood platters and ocean-view dining

Practical information

Book ahead and check tides because access and atmosphere change through the day.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Zanzibar.
